title: VR-Better
description: Immersive & optimized Minecraft VR experience for QuestCraft
body:
# VR-Better (QuestCraft Edition)

Do you want to play Minecraft VR on your **QuestCraft** without dealing with complicated mods or losing FPS?  
Here’s a pack made just for you: **VR-Better!**

## ✨ Features
- Optimized VR experience for **QuestCraft**  
- Smooth gameplay without stuttering or frame drops  
- Hand-picked combat, exploration, and building mods tailored for standalone VR  
- Easy setup with pre-configured settings  
- Jump straight into the VR world hassle-free 🚀

## 📌 Notes
- Exclusively designed for **QuestCraft**  
- No PC required, fully standalone  

## 💻 PCVR Note ❗❗❗
If you want to play this pack on **PCVR**, you need to install **Vivecraft** and **Fabric API** in addition.
